title: Remade & Remastered: Snowflakes & Sleigh Rides
description: For the people who want to play completely vanilla, in a brand new way.
body:
**All the mods the game needs without _any_ of the mods you don't want.**

We aim to add **as many mods as possible** to **improve the overall _performance_**, **_atmosphere_**, and **_feature-set_**, without **drastically** changing anything about what makes the base game so **_magical_**.

- **250+ MODS**
- **HIGHLY OPTIMIZED**
- **HIGHLY IMMERSIVE**
- **VANILLA+**

This is **solely** made for the people who want to play **completely vanilla**, in a **_brand new way_**.

The changes that have been made to the base game include modded additions to the forestry, shader packs that make it feel more like our real life, resource packs that alter the animations, adding more character to the pack overall, and a complete sound design overhaul.

We truly believe this is the best solution for anyone who enjoys playing Vanilla in almost every way, only with a few needed additions. And, with constant updates, patches, and bug-fixes, you are sure to always be receiving a brand-new experience every time you log-in.

Complementary Shaders - Reimagined - **https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined/version/latest**
